findings.title: LCP above good threshold (12.5s)

findings.title: Total blocking time is high (693ms)

findings.evidence: axe violations: aria-progressbar-name(serious,2 nodes), aria-prohibited-attr(serious,8 nodes), color-contrast(serious,8 nodes), frame-title(serious,1 nodes), image-alt(critical,4 nodes), image-redundant-alt(minor,4 nodes), landmark-contentinfo-is-top-level(moderate,1 nodes), landmark-unique(moderate,1 nodes)

verdict: Homepage batch: 5 principles with issues; top concerns: high be-discoverable: Low non-JS discoverability (5%); high be-inclusive: axe found 14 violation groups; medium be-private-and-secure: Large third-party/network surface.
_caveats: Scale batch: no Lighthouse, LCP or INP in this pass; coordinator CDP data should fill objective metrics.
Memory is a single heap snapshot, not a repeated-interaction leak proof.
Dark-mode/reduced-motion are inferred from probes unless separately captured.
Memory principle pending rigorous same-session recheck; no pass/issue asserted from single/coarse heap snapshots.
Passive-only principles patched: trustworthy/resilient/natural-interactions/guided-navigation require active flow testing and are not counted as passes.
